title: Build community-driven software projects on GitHub
summary: Learn how GitHub enables you to build communities that foster communication and collaboration while reinforcing recommended guidelines, codes of conduct, and security best practices.

sections.title: Build community-driven software projects on GitHub
sections.summary: Learn how GitHub enables you to build communities that foster communication and collaboration while reinforcing recommended guidelines, codes of conduct, and security best practices.

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use key GitHub features, including issues, notifications, branches, commits, and pull requests.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Manage an InnerSource program by using GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to manage a successful InnerSource program on GitHub through effective discoverability, guidance, and maintenance.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-innersource-program-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage an InnerSource program by using GitHub

lessons.title: Create an open-source program by using GitHub best practices
lessons.content_md:
Learn to create a successful open-source program by establishing contributor guidance, following proven processes, and by using community standards.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-open-source-program-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create an open-source program by using GitHub best practices

lessons.title: Upload your project by using GitHub best practices
lessons.content_md:
Learn to upload your existing project to GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/upload-project-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Upload your project by using GitHub best practices

lessons.title: Migrate your repository by using GitHub best practices
lessons.content_md:
Learn to move your existing project to GitHub from a legacy version control system.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-repository-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate your repository by using GitHub best practices

lessons.title: Maintain a secure repository by using GitHub best practices
lessons.content_md:
Learn best practices for building, hosting, and maintaining a secure repository on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/maintain-secure-repository-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Maintain a secure repository by using GitHub best practices

lessons.title: Contribute to an open-source project on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to contribute to an open-source project on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/contribute-open-source/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Contribute to an open-source project on GitHub

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Build community-driven software projects on GitHub
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Build community-driven software projects on GitHub**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
